recalls.Description: Kroger has issued a recall for its Halloween-themed Skeleton Wax Candle, which features a white wax design in a black plastic bowl adorned with skeleton and pumpkin decorations. The product's warning label contains a misspelling, stating: "WANING: PLASTIC CONTAINER AND ONAMENTS ARE FLAMMABLE". Additionally, it includes a price sticker of $7 and a caution that the item is not suitable for children aged 12 and under, with the model number D310800CN01.
recalls.Title: Kroger Recalls Skeleton Wax Candles Due to Fire Risk
recalls.ConsumerContact: Consumers can reach The Kroger Co. at 800-576-4377 from 7 a.m. to Midnight ET on weekdays and 7 a.m. to 9:30 p.m. ET on weekends. For further details, leave a message at https://www.kroger.com/hc/help/contact-us/customer-comments or visit www.kroger.com/i/recall-alerts. More information can also be found by clicking on "Recall Alerts" at the bottom of the Kroger homepage.

Retailers.Name: Available at Kroger stores nationwide, including Dillons, Fred Meyer, Fry's, Smith's, and King Soopers from September 2025 to October 2025 for approximately $7.

Importers.Name: Carole Accessories, Inc., of Los Angeles, California

Distributors.Name: The Kroger Co., of Cincinnati, Ohio

Hazards.Name: Flammable ornaments posing fire and burn risks

Remedies.Name: Stop using the candle and return it to any Kroger store for a full refund.

recalls.metaDescription: Kroger recalls Skeleton Wax Candles due to fire hazards. Return for a full refund. Learn more about the recall.

recalls.Description: Orly Corporation is recalling its lavender scented candles housed in round wooden bread bowls due to potential fire and burn hazards. These three-wick candles weigh approximately 8 ounces and feature three lavender strands on top. The candles are marked with the label 'CBOCS Distribution, Inc.' and UPC 197712076826 on the base, along with fire safety warnings.
recalls.Title: Orly Recalls Lavender Scented Candles in Wooden Bowls Due to Fire and Burn Risks
recalls.ConsumerContact: For further details, consumers can reach Orly Corporation at 800-917-2573, email candlerecall@orly-corp.com, or visit https://www.orly-corp.com/cracker-barrel-candle-recall and www.orly-corp.com and select 'Candle Recall'.

Products.Name: Lavender Scented Candle in Wooden Bowl

Images.Caption: Recalled Lavender scented candle in a round wooden bread bowl
Label located on the underside of the recalled candle

Injuries.Name: The firm has received eight reports of flames reaching excessive heights, including three reports of minor burns.

Retailers.Name: Available exclusively at Cracker Barrel Old Country Store® from November 2023 to May 2024 for approximately $13.

Importers.Name: CBOCS Distribution Inc., of Lebanon, Tennessee

Hazards.Name: Excessive flame height can ignite the bowl, leading to fire and burn hazards.

Remedies.Name: Stop using the recalled candle immediately and return it to any Cracker Barrel Old Country Store® for a full refund.

recalls.metaDescription: Orly recalls lavender scented candles in wooden bowls due to fire hazards. Return for a full refund at Cracker Barrel.
